source_note: Final order in the electronic examination of the Fuel Adjustment Clause (FAC) of Kentucky Utilities Company for May 1, 2023 through October 31, 2023, Kentucky PSC Case No. 2024-00146, issued March 19, 2025 (3 pp; the six-month FAC fuel-cost review under 807 KAR 5:056 — companion to the seeded Kentucky Power FAC order 2024-00136). PDF at the deterministic KY PSC path psc.ky.gov/pscscf/2024 Cases/2024-00146/; case folder psc.ky.gov/Case/ViewCaseFilings/2024-00146. Page-1 verified 2026-06-10.
